description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a minimalist, boxy silhouette and clean lines. The sofa features a solid, light gray upholstered frame with broad, straight armrests and three distinct seat sections. Three bright green, rectangular back cushions are positioned evenly along the backrest, providing a striking color contrast and visual interest. The seat cushions are integrated into the base, appearing firm and uniform, while the back cushions are slightly loose and plush. The sofa stands on four short, dark legs that are subtly visible beneath the frame, giving it a stable yet slightly elevated appearance. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, boxy gray sofa with three bright green back cushions and broad straight armrests, supported by four short dark legs. The design is clean, contemporary, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid gray armrest, the thickness of the frame, and the profile of the green back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three green back cushions, the three seat sections, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and the side profile of the cushions.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous gray back panel and the tops of the three green back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual green back cushions evenly spaced, with three integrated seat sections; back cushions appear loose, seat cushions are fixed and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at full seat height, rectangular profile, no visible padding or decorative elements, matching the sofa's gray upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, dark legs positioned at the corners, simple block style, slightly recessed under the frame, likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three separate green cushions; backrest is continuous in structure but segmented visually by the cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
